package rulecoverage

func PositiveDbQueryArgumentErasedToAny() string {
    ruleID := "db_query_argument_erased_to_any"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Concrete DB arguments erased to `any` or `interface{}` immediately before query execution."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
